info.title: Jukebox API
info.description: Create a group with friends, add your music, vote in real time to choose the next song, and listen to it together!

get.description: Get details of a specific vote.

post.description: Create a new vote for the group (e.g. to skip a song or like a song). Defaults to a 3-minute timeout.
Cast an upvote or downvote on an existing vote.

get.description: Check whether the API process is running and able to answer requests.
Get the API version exposed by the running process.

results.title: Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Official Video) (4K Remaster)
results.description: The official video for “Never Gonna Give You Up” by Rick Astley. Never: The Autobiography OUT NOW! Follow this link to get ...

get.description: Search YouTube for songs matching a query string.

parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return (1-50).
parameters.name: maxResults

parameters.description: The token for the page of results to return (for pagination).
parameters.name: pageToken

parameters.description: The type of results to return: "video" or "playlist". Defaults to "video".
parameters.name: type

get.description: Get the full music queue for the group, ordered by insertion, with positions.

post.description: Add a new song to the group's queue. Duration is fetched automatically from YouTube.

delete.description: Remove a song from the queue by its ID.

playlistItems.title: Taylor Swift - The Fate of Ophelia (Official Music Video)

post.description: Add a playlist to the group's queue. Duration is fetched automatically from YouTube. (limited to 50 songs per playlist)

get.description: Get information about the song currently playing, or null if none.

post.description: Move to and start playing the next song in the queue.
Pause playback of the current song.
Skip the current song and move to the next one in the queue.

get.description: Serve the public jukebox player page for a given stream token.
Get information about the song currently playing for a given stream token, or null if nothing is playing.

post.description: Create a new group and return its access code and admin token.
Join an existing group using its code and a chosen pseudo.

get.description: Get information about the group the authenticated user belongs to.

delete.description: Remove the authenticated user from their current group.

patch.description: Set the music provider used by the group (currently only YouTube is supported).
Update the maximum number of users allowed in the group.

get.description: Retrieve the current jukebox stream token for the group.

patch.description: Generate a new jukebox stream token, invalidating the previous one.

post.description: Authenticate as an administrator and receive the bearer token required for admin routes.
Ban an IP address from accessing the API.
Remove a ban from an IP address.

get.description: Get a list of all banned IP addresses.
Get the current daily YouTube API call limit.

patch.description: Update the daily YouTube API call limit.

get.description: Get the current YouTube API usage for the day.
Get the current maximum cache line sizes for search and metadata caches.

patch.description: Update the maximum number of cache lines for the search and metadata caches.

delete.description: Clear all server-side caches (search and metadata).

post.description: Cleanup the search and metadata caches.

get.description: Get global game totals and host resource statistics for the admin dashboard.
